reviews.review_title: This was fun while it lasted
reviews.review_description:
I got this game back when it was first still starting to get popular and I loved it so much I’d spent money and little Timmy ahh me accidentally spent $160 so your welcome for the money lol and uhh it fell off… I still say sorry to my mom to this day. Thanks for giving me some of the best moments of my gaming career and I hope people find this game again. Kunani out…







(I will miss you)
I loved this time I got it around 2022 it was really OG for me I like the other game but it took monkeys places fame.    RIP

reviews.review_title: Rip monkeys place thanks for the memory
reviews.review_description:
I got this app back in 2023 or 2024. When I started playing, I thought, "This is the best Gtag fan game EVER." I played this daily for hours. Absolute masterpiece of a game, I wish it never died. RIP Monkeys Place, you were an absolutely amazing game.



(Note to Gandalf)


Thank you for the memories🥹

First off one of the most best. Gorilla tag knock off better then Capuchin and how Trusted user has the vents but I just wish I had mod but the mods you can buy are good And also, I love the Patrick 
cosmetic inside of the Donator vents and yes I ￼love this game so much that I donated to it
Constantly stuck in the tutorial. No explanation how to get out

Alr so I love how thay added more stuff that is actually useful and not just cosmetics like for instance private lobbies. I can finally play with my friends without having to join a server over and over for 10 minutes. They didn't add much to horror but I love how you have to remember the colors and numbers but the last thing there needs to be in this game, is a tag of some sort like it would be awesome to have an original idea for tag like lava monster or something and the lave monster would climb on obstacles to get to the normal monkeys.

Honestly, out of all the gorilla tag knockoffs I’ve played, this one is the best. I love the idea of the collectible cosmetics, and a good way to get bananas instead of just "Get 100 every day take it or leave it". Also, I love the ability cosmetics like scale and speed. People may complain about the bad graphics, but me personally, it reminds of me of some old game you’d play on the web way back then and I’m all for it. The only thing that bothers me is some of the glitches, like the inf banan glitch.
